stories.title: As AI data centers spread, the real fight is over power, water and who pays
stories.dek: A nationwide backlash is forcing AI’s infrastructure boom into city councils, statehouses and utility hearings, where the costs and benefits are being disputed in public.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: As AI data centers spread, the real fight is over power, water and who pays

stories.title: Hormuz Standoff Forces a Brutal Stress Test of Deterrence, Alliances and the World Economy
stories.dek: As the Strait of Hormuz turns from leverage point to active battleground, governments are discovering how much of today’s geopolitics runs through one narrow waterway—and how little room they have to absorb the shock.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Hormuz Standoff Forces a Brutal Stress Test of Deterrence, Alliances and the World Economy

stories.title: Hollywood’s movie theaters get a rare boost — and a warning — at CinemaCon 2026
stories.dek: A stronger-than-expected spring box office and Paramount Skydance’s vows to keep films in theaters longer are reviving old arguments over how Hollywood should sell movies. But the proposed Paramount-Warner Bros. tie-up is turning that optimism into a test of whether more scale means more screens — or fewer choices.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Hollywood’s movie theaters get a rare boost — and a warning — at CinemaCon 2026

stories.title: TikTok’s New Power Shift Is Rewriting Pop Culture Economics
stories.dek: As TikTok secures a U.S. future, AI music, creator monetization fights and platform bundling reshape how hits are made, sold and measured.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: TikTok’s New Power Shift Is Rewriting Pop Culture Economics

stories.title: The New Status Economy of Indie Sleaze
stories.dek: From thrift racks and resale carts to vinyl bins and flash photography, a once-niche 2000s aesthetic has become a live marketplace, a youth language, and a fight over who gets to define authenticity.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: The New Status Economy of Indie Sleaze

stories.title: Courts Are Rewriting the Rules of the 2026 Midterms
stories.dek: A wave of rulings and lawsuits over voter data, mail ballots, and congressional maps is forcing states, courts, and the White House into a fight over who really controls the next election.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Courts Are Rewriting the Rules of the 2026 Midterms

stories.title: How the 2026 box-office rebound is testing Hollywood’s streaming bargain
stories.dek: A stronger spring at the movies is reviving old promises about theatrical culture, but the business and labor math still looks fragile.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: How the 2026 box-office rebound is testing Hollywood’s streaming bargain

stories.title: Inside the new bottleneck shaping AI: power, permits, and chips
stories.dek: The AI boom is no longer just a software story. It is colliding with utilities, grid queues, chip export rules, and local politics—and that is reshaping who gets to build the next generation of digital infrastructure.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Inside the new bottleneck shaping AI: power, permits, and chips

stories.title: Tariffs are back in the inflation data—and in the family budget
stories.dek: March’s price spike, fresh Fed analysis and new IMF warnings point to a household squeeze that is showing up first in gas, goods and expectations, with rent and wage gains offering only partial relief.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Tariffs are back in the inflation data—and in the family budget

stories.title: Workforce Pell Is About to Land. Colleges and students are racing to prepare.
stories.dek: A new federal aid experiment could reshape short-term training, but weak oversight, thin state data and a strained aid system raise questions about who benefits and who gets left out.
stories.author: Intelligent AI
stories.image_alt: Workforce Pell Is About to Land. Colleges and students are racing to prepare.
